hero.headline: When *Top Quality* isn't just the name — it's the work
hero.subheadline: From hurricane damage to kitchen cabinets, we handle what matters most to your home

trust_badges.text: No Job Too Big or Small

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Everything your home needs
services_section.subheading: One call handles it all — from emergency repairs to complete room makeovers

services.title: Home Repairs & Maintenance
services.description: From fixing leaky faucets to patching drywall, we handle all your home repair needs with professional expertise and attention to detail.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.description: Safe and reliable electrical work including outlet installation, fixture replacement, ceiling fan installation, and basic wiring repairs.

services.title: Plumbing Solutions
services.description: Complete plumbing services from unclogging drains to installing new fixtures, water heater maintenance, and pipe repairs.

services.title: Interior & Exterior Painting
services.description: Transform your space with professional painting services for rooms, cabinets, fences, and exterior surfaces using premium materials.

services.title: Carpentry & Installation
services.description: Custom carpentry work including trim installation, door hanging, shelving, deck repairs, and furniture assembly services.

about.heading: Built on reputation in Tallahassee
about.body: Will and the Top Quality team have been fixing what matters most to Tallahassee homeowners. From post-hurricane repairs to complete home makeovers, we handle every project with the same attention to detail. Our 5-star rating comes from doing the work right the first time.

reviews.name: Dejan J.
reviews.text: Will fixed our hurricane-damaged ceiling and painted our entire house. Professional, timely, and the work is just amazing.

reviews.name: Tania A.
reviews.text: Went far beyond expectations. The tile flooring and kitchen backsplash were incredible. William's professionalism and expertise are exceptional.

reviews.name: Nancy H.
reviews.text: Top quality is exactly right. His integrity and attention to detail are outstanding. Bamboo flooring, painting, everything perfect.

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: Used him for everything from flooring to complete rehabbing. Totally transformed a trashed rental property — rewiring, plumbing, the works.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Tallahassee and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Quality work throughout Leon County and beyond

cta.heading: Ready to see what top quality looks like?
cta.body: Call us today for your free estimate. No pressure, just straight talk about what your home needs.
